case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS RAYFORD CLARENCE JR.

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $400.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RAYFORD  CLARENCE JR.
